hero.heading:
Olá!
Vamos aprender portguês!
hero.lead: Nurturing Portuguese language and culture in young minds. Quality education for children from Kindergarten through Grade 12 in the heart of Vancouver.

school.heading: Our School
school.lead: Founded by a group of passionate Portuguese immigrants, Escola Portuguesa has been a cornerstone of cultural preservation in Vancouver's Portuguese community.
school.body: For over four decades, we've been dedicated to providing high-quality Portuguese language education to children in the Greater Vancouver area. Our mission is to preserve and promote Portuguese language, culture, and heritage while fostering a love for learning in a supportive environment.

curriculumSection.heading: Our Curriculum
curriculumSection.intro: A comprehensive Portuguese language program from Kindergarten through Grade 12, following international standards and adapted for Canadian students.

teachersSection.heading: Our Teachers
teachersSection.body: Our dedicated team of experienced educators is passionate about Portuguese language and culture. Each teacher brings unique expertise and a commitment to student success.

cta.heading: Ready to Begin Your Journey?
cta.body: Join our vibrant community and give your child the gift of language and culture. Enrollment is now open for the 2026-2027 school year!
